EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} could not change table "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} changed table "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} could not delete table "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} created table "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} deleted table "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} could not create table "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
